name: Best of the West Cookies
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 325 degrees.
2. Cream together butter and sugars until light and fluffy.
3. Add egg, mixing well, then add oil, mixing well.
4. Add oats, cornflake crumbs, coconut, and nuts, stirring well.
5. Then add flour, baking soda, and salt. Mix until combined.
6. Place parchment paper on a sheet pan.
7. Scoop cookies to be the size of walnuts and place them on the pan.
8. Flatten with a fork dipped in water.
9. Bake for 12 minutes, or until lightly golden brown.
10. Allow to cool for a few minutes before removing from the pan.
11. Make 4 dozen cookies.
